config.script:
'tree services #include "50617"
function fopen() : fopen = true tsrs_fopen() page_.cmdenabled CMD_SAVEFORM, false end function
function fclose() tsrs_fclose() end function
function fback 'jezeli istnieje funkcja obslugi to ją wołamy if not g_pHandlerClose is nothing then fback = g_pHandlerClose() else fback = true end if if fback then page_.goback end if end function
function fsave() 'jezeli istnieje funkcja obslugi to ja wolamy if not g_pHandlerSave is nothing then fsave = g_pHandlerSave() end if end function
function new_custombuilder() set new_custombuilder = g_pTSRS.new_custombuilder() end function
function prepare_explorer(byref pPB) set prepare_explorer = tsrs_new_explorer(pPB) end function
dim g_pLastTreeDef : set g_pLastTreeDef = nothing dim g_nTypeId : g_nTypeId = 0 dim g_nIdObj : g_nIdObj = 0
function show(byref pTreeDef,byval strTitle,nTypeId,nIdObj) '--- some setup page_.topelement.title = strTitle page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_HEADER).text = strTitle
'--- make initial fill set g_pLastTreeDef = pTreeDef g_nTypeId = nTypeId g_nIdObj = nIdObj frefresh
show = page_.domodalauto() end function
function frefresh() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE).body.removeall tsrs_start page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE),g_pLastTreeDef,g_nTypeId,g_nIdObj end function
function get_dest_table() set get_dest_table = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE) end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ ' Return Choice Usage ' you must configure TSPB with ' set_hli_function "varFunctionHLI='on_item_selected_hli' appvarParamTypeid=%1 appvarParamIdobj=%2" ' then ask get_result_typeid / get_result_idobj '------------------------------------------------------------ function get_result_typeid() get_result_typeid = g_nTypeId end function
function get_result_idobj() get_result_idobj = g_nIdObj end function
function on_item_selected_hli(byref pHLI) '-- retrieve param and set result g_nTypeId = pHLI(APPVAR_PARAM_TYPEID) g_nIdObj = pHLI(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) page_.goback end function
'funkcje obslugi zdrarzen dim g_pHandlerGet:set g_pHandlerGet = nothing dim g_pHandlerEnter:set g_pHandlerEnter = nothing dim g_pHandlerClose:set g_pHandlerClose = nothing dim g_pHandlerSave:set g_pHandlerSave = nothing
function set_close_handler(byval pFun) set g_pHandlerClose = pFun end function
function set_save_handler(byval pFun) set g_pHandlerSave = pFun page_.cmdenabled CMD_SAVEFORM, true end function
function set_transfer_handler_get(byval pFun) set g_pHandlerGet = pFun end function
function set_transfer_handler_enter(byval pFun) set g_pHandlerEnter = pFun end function
function c100_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c100_ongetdata = true if not g_pHandlerGet is nothing then g_pHandlerGet oCtrl end if end function
function c100_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) if not g_pHandlerEnter is nothing then g_pHandlerEnter oCtrl , newValue , page_ end if c100_ondataentered = true end function
